# QC-02: Coherence & Conflict Resolution

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Detect contradictions, competing priorities, and logical inconsistencies between requirements. Surface all conflicts with severity ratings and resolution options. Force stakeholders to resolve all blocking conflicts before design begins.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 1 | Intent Ingestion | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent analyses, human resolves |
| **Agent does** | Cross-reference all requirements; identify conflicts; generate conflict map with severity ratings and resolution options. |
| **Human does** | Review conflict map; make binding decisions on all blocking and significant conflicts. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Validated feature specification | QC-01 | Complete specification produced by QC-01. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Conflict resolution record | decision | Log of all conflicts identified, severity ratings, resolution options presented, and stakeholder decisions made. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Product Owner |

Unresolved blocking conflicts prevent progression to Stage 2. Non-blocking conflicts are documented and accepted.

## Dependencies

- `QC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8 | Risk identification and assessment of ICT changes must include conflict analysis |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9 | Risk management system must identify foreseeable risks including specification conflicts |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Product / Delivery · **Owner role:** Product Owner
